text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Ardan's next race fast approaching, she and I are spending our
days training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My time went down, didn't it? My breathing doesn't feel as ragged as
before either.
choice_data_list:
Yeah, you're flying through this regimen! Good
job!

Yeah, you're flying through this regimen! Good
job!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Now then... I shall get back to practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Ardan's in practice mode, nothing can shake her out of it, not
even praise.
choice_data_list: That focus of yours is your strongest weapon.
That focus of yours is your strongest weapon.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
A... weapon? Ah, my apologies. I appreciate the compliment—I've just
never thought about it like that before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's unaware of the effects her determination has had on
her and her training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: As I'm sure you know, I was born with a fragile, weak body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I do not know when my body will give out on me. Among the
countless Umamusume who shine so bright, my star may very well burn
out the fastest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Just like that painting in the woods, I may fade away and be
forgotten. And yet, here and now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I still wish to shine, and I'm willing to do whatever it takes to do so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as she spoke about her own circumstances, Mejiro Ardan's eyes
burned with a quiet... yet firm determination.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'm ready, Trainer. Please time my last lap.

text_block_list.name: Observing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Huh? How many laps does that make? She's doing a lot of exercises...
Will she be okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can hear the voice of Ardan's anxious juniors. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... So far, so good...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Is everything all right?
choice_data_list:
I was just wondering if we should add another
lap or two.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I... I would love that, actually. I was just thinking that I wanted to run
a little more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for today. I feel like today's training was especially fruitful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In addition, I was wondering... Perhaps we could use today's
increased practice regimen going forward?
choice_data_list: I was just about to ask.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Ehehe, I should be grateful. As I am now, I don't have to worry
about overheating anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Before my debut, there were times where I could not practice for days
at a time. I'm glad to know that's all in the past now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, our post-training meeting ends on an optimistic note. Yet
despite the fact that the day's over, Ardan's posture remains as
composed as ever.
choice_data_list:
You can relax a bit more during your breaks,
you know.

You can relax a bit more during your breaks,
you know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?
choice_data_list:
You could take a seat or even take a nap on the
sofa.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you, but I feel more at ease like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Racers in the Mejiro family make a lot of public appearances, so we're
taught how to conduct ourselves from a very young age. And, well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Family Friend
text_block_list.text:
Ardan? Why are you over here, all by your lonesome? You're leaning
against the wall... Are you feeling sick?

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text: No, ma'am. I was just thinking to myself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Family Friend
text_block_list.text: Now, now, don't push yourself. You have to be mindful of your health!

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Oh... If I relax too much, others will think I'm sick...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my apologies. In any case, I feel more relaxed like this, so you
needn't worry.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I promised you I wouldn't overdo it, correct? I assure you, I
am fine.
choice_data_list:
All right, but remember, it's okay to do what
you want sometimes.

All right, but remember, it's okay to do what
you want sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... I don't know if spoiling me like that is such a good idea,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps tomorrow I will skip practice simply because I feel like it.
What will you do then?
choice_data_list:
I-I'm not going to go easy on you in terms of
training!

I-I'm not going to go easy on you in terms of
training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... And that's exactly what I'm hoping for. But thank you for your
concern. I promise I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she smiles, I feel my own desire to further protest melt away. It
seems even I am no match for Mejiro Ardan's stubborn determination.
